series_metadata.series_description: Page certifying the filed annual statement contains correct information with original signatures.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain hard copy until imaged; then destroy hard copy. Retain image and review after 5 years, transfer to updated media if needed at that time. ; Paper: Retain hard copy until imaged; then destroy hard copy. Retain image and review after 5 years, transfer to updated media if needed at that time., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
